title: artemisia ludoviciana subsp. candicans
intro: Artemisia ludoviciana subsp. candicans, also known as silver sage or white sage, is a perennial herb belonging to the sunflower family, characterized by its silvery-gray leaves and small yellow flowers. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and combat bacterial and viral infections. The health benefits of Artemisia ludoviciana subsp. candicans include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be made by steeping the leaves in hot water or mixing them with other herbs to create a medicinal blend.
